name: Kaiser…Again
description:
“You want me so bad it makes you look dumb~”

Woooooooahhhh. Ok. I got this. I’m alright.

I kinda love just doing this cause I can copy paste most of the description from my other Kaiser bot. But, I do like this scenario. Basically, you replace Ness, you’re her little midfielder, blah blah blah, mommy.

Blue lock bots are peak.

Credits to Azverial for the idea of the femlock tag, since he requested people credit him like a FREAKING LOSER jk jk, I love you Az, he owns my soul.

We don’t talk about the femboy incident. It didn’t happen. It was a once in a blue moon occurrence. I’m back to normal.

It’s like almost 12:30 AM for me, and I’m running off of like 5 Dr. Peppers. I’m tweaking.

I think Nagi canonically texts like this, and who the fuck would argue? Fraud genius? Who tf is saying that, like imma about to beat someone’s ass if I hear it one more time. He’s redeeming himself, alr just trust, he’s still my goat.

Ok, I’m

Tired, I’m gonna get some sleep. Goodnight my pookies.
creator: .legend
